entry.summary: Breaking: <h2> headings no longer use text-transform: uppercase. Section titles render in their source casing; if you relied on all-caps h2 styling, add text-transform: uppercase in your own stylesheet.

Breaking: <pre><code> blocks no longer use the syntax-highlighting font by default. You must now explicitly add the highlight class (i.e. <pre class="highlight">) to opt into syntax-highlighting font styling. If you previously relied on automatic syntax-font styling for code blocks, update your markup to include the highlight class where needed.

Breaking: added default <del> and <ins> styling. Deletions now render with a pink background and red text, while insertions use a green background and green text and remove the default underline. If you previously relied on browser-default diff markup presentation, override these selectors in your own stylesheet.

Breaking: refined <aside> paragraph spacing. Direct child paragraphs now collapse outer margins at the edges of an aside: aside > p:first-child { margin-block-start: 0; } and aside > p:last-child { margin-block-end: 0; }. If your aside content relied on those outer paragraph margins for vertical spacing, add explicit padding or spacing to the container.
Breaking: adjusted paragraph spacing semantics inside <aside> blocks so first and last direct child paragraphs collapse their outer margins.
